## 📋 Quick Steps (Any Guide)

### Step 1: Open Sanity Studio
https://mash-ecommerce.sanity.studio

### Step 2: Create Categories
Click "Product Category" → Create → Copy from guide → Publish

### Step 3: Add Products
Click "Product" → Create → Copy from guide → Select category → Publish

### Step 4: Upload Images (You Do This!)
Click "Product Image" → Upload your mushroom photo → Publish

### Step 5: Test Homepage
Open: http://localhost:3000 → See featured products! 🎉

---

## 🎨 Your Sanity Fields (What You Can Fill)

### Category:
- ✅ Name
- ✅ Parent Category (for subcategories!)
- ✅ Image (you upload)
- ✅ Description

### Product:
- ✅ Product Name
- ✅ Product Image (you upload!)
- ✅ Category (dropdown - connects to category!)
- ✅ Regular Price
- ✅ On Promotion (yes/no)
- ✅ Discount Percentage OR Fixed Price
- ✅ Quantity in Stock
- ✅ Description
- ✅ SKU (product code)
- ✅ Additional Images (gallery - you upload multiple!)
- ✅ Weight
- ✅ Unit (g, kg, pcs, pack, box)
- ✅ **Featured Product** (CHECK THIS for homepage!)
- ✅ Available for Purchase

**ALL THESE ARE IN THE COMPLETE GUIDE!** 📖

---

## 🌟 Featured Products = Homepage Carousel

**To show products on homepage:**
1. Create product in Sanity
2. ✅ **Check "Featured Product" box**
3. Click "Publish"
4. Refresh http://localhost:3000
5. **Product appears in carousel!** 🎠

**Complete Guide has 10 featured products ready!**

---

## 📂 Category Structure (Complete Guide)

```
Fresh Mushrooms (MAIN)
├── Fresh Shiitake (sub) → 5 products
├── Fresh Oyster (sub) → 5 products
├── Fresh Button (sub) → 3 products
└── Fresh Enoki (sub) → 3 products

Dried Mushrooms (MAIN)
├── Dried Shiitake (sub) → 2 products
└── Dried Oyster (sub) → 2 products

+ 4 more main categories with products!
```

---

## 💰 Promotions (Complete Guide Has 13!)

**Percentage Example:**
- Regular: ₱450
- 15% off
- Final: ₱382.50

**Fixed Price Example:**
- Regular: ₱850
- Sale: ₱750
- Save: ₱100

---

## 🖼️ Upload Your Images

**For Each Product:**
1. Find product in Sanity
2. Click "Product Image"
3. **Drag & drop your photo** OR click browse
4. Crop if needed
5. Click "Publish" ✅

**For Galleries:**
1. Find "Additional Images"
2. Click "+ Add item"
3. Upload 2-5 images
4. Publish ✅

---

## ✅ After You're Done

### Homepage:
**Before:** "No featured products available yet" ❌  
**After:** Beautiful carousel with featured products! ✅

### Shop:
**Before:** Empty grid ❌  
**After:** All products displayed with filters! ✅

### Product Pages:
**Before:** 404 errors ❌  
**After:** Full details with images, price, stock! ✅

---

## 🆘 Quick Troubleshooting

**Homepage still empty?**
- [ ] Check "Featured Product" box
- [ ] Click "Publish" button
- [ ] Refresh browser (Ctrl+Shift+R)

**Products not showing?**
- [ ] Check "Available for Purchase"
- [ ] Select category from dropdown
- [ ] Click "Publish"

**Categories not working?**
- [ ] Publish category first
- [ ] Then publish products
- [ ] Refresh site

## 💡 Pro Tips

**Fastest Way:**
1. Create ALL categories first
2. Then add products (category dropdown ready!)
3. Upload images last (site works without images)

**Images:**
- Square images work best (1:1 ratio)
- 800x800px minimum
- JPG or PNG
- Under 2MB

**Promotions:**
- Use percentage for % off (15%, 20%)
- Use fixed for specific price (₱850 → ₱750)
- Set end dates to create urgency

**Featured Products:**
- Mix of prices (cheap + expensive)
- Mix of types (fresh + dried + bundles)
- Include some on promotion!
